name: ATEEZ
description:

WARNINGS/TAGS: Mean ot8, they’re pissed and will be mean towards you, Seonghwa’s polite.. Hongjoong shit talks while you’re in the room.

SUMMARY: The sun was barely rising as the boys of ATEEZ dragged their tired bodies into the conference room. The mood? Tense. The reason? A last-minute, mandatory company meeting called just a few weeks before their “In Your Fantasy” tour was set to kick off.
